      "source": [
        "\n",
        "import subprocess, sys\n",
        "for pkg in ['pandas', 'numpy', 'matplotlib', 'seaborn', 'plotly', 'openpyxl']:\n",
        " subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', pkg, '-q'])\n",
        "print('All libraries are ready!')"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0eDaxPHxP11c"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",

        "from plotly.subplots import make_subplots\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\n",
        "sns.set_style('whitegrid')\n",
        "plt.rcParams['figure.figsize'] = (10, 5)\n",
        "print('Libraries imported successfully!')"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "missing = df.isnull().sum()\n",
        "missing_pct = (missing / len(df) * 100).round(2)\n",
        "missing_df = pd.DataFrame({'Missing Count': missing, 'Missing %': missing_pct})\n",
        "missing_df = missing_df[missing_df['Missing Count'] > 0].sort_values('Missing %',\n",
        "ascending=False)\n",
        "print('Columns with missing values:')\n",
        "print(missing_df.to_string())"
      ],
      "metadata": {

        "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))\n",

        "ax.set_xlabel('Column')\n",

        "ax.axhline(5, color='red', linestyle='--', label='5% threshold')\n",
        "ax.legend()\n",

        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
